creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
OK. I don't have an answer here. But I think if you want to
get a meaningful, and quick answer; you're going to need to
provide a little more info:

1) What version FreeBSD -- the output of uname -a

2) version of poudriere (complete FLAVOR support was only
   recently added, and an even newer version is slated for
   later today)

3) maybe even the output od svn info /usr/ports

Just trying to help. :)

--Chris
